## ✅ Checklist
<!-- Go through this checklist before requesting a review -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have removed any console.log or debugging code

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated inline code comments
- [ ] I have updated TypeScript types/interfaces if applicable

### Smart Contracts (if applicable)
- [ ] Contract changes maintain storage layout compatibility
- [ ] Gas optimization considered
- [ ] Security best practices followed
- [ ] Foundry tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Contract formatting checked (`forge fmt`)

### Frontend (if applicable)
- [ ] ESLint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Responsive design verified
- [ ] Accessibility considerations addressed

### Security
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
- [ ] Security implications considered
- [ ] No new security vulnerabilities introduced
